title: Story of G.I. Joe
writer: Leopold Atlas, Guy Endore, Philip Stevenson
actors: Burgess Meredith, Robert Mitchum, Freddie Steele
plot: At the close of WWII, Pulitzer Prize-winning war correspondent Ernie Pyle travels with, and reports on, the U.S. Army's 77th Infantry Division during their liberation of Italy.
awards: Nominated for 4 Oscars. 5 wins & 8 nominations total
